Do you commute to downtown by car and need to ﬁ nd reliable all-day parking?
To improve availability for those looking for all-day parking, the City has recently introduced
all-day metered parking on the 300 Block of Cedar Street (between Vernon and Front Streets).
These prime spots are only a few minutes’ walk from downtown. The meters charge a ﬂ at $5 rate COW-1pm start
for the day, which is the same rate as the parkade. The commuter parking allows you to leave
